title: NZ School Holidays 2027 — All Term Dates & Holiday Planner
description: Every 2027 NZ school holiday — April, July and September breaks plus summer — with official term dates, crowd levels and how far ahead to book each one.
html_content:
NZ School Holidays 2027

Term dates are set by the Ministry of Education. Dates below are for most state schools — some private schools and regions may vary slightly. Always confirm with your school directly.

✅ Official dates: These are the Ministry of Education's published 2027 term dates. The April, July and September holidays are fixed nationally; Term 1 start (late Jan–early Feb) and Term 4 end (by 17 Dec) vary slightly by school — confirm yours at education.govt.nz.
Holiday periodDatesDurationCrowd levelBook ahead
Summer Holidays 2026–2717 Dec 2026 – 31 Jan 20277 weeksPEAK4–6 months
Term 1 ends (Autumn Break)10 Apr – 26 Apr 20272.5 weeksHIGH6–8 weeks
Term 2 ends (Winter Break)3 Jul – 18 Jul 20272 weeksHIGH8–10 weeks (ski)
Term 3 ends (Spring Break)25 Sep – 10 Oct 20272 weeksMEDIUM4–6 weeks
Summer Holidays 2027–2818 Dec 2027 – Jan 20287 weeksPEAK4–6 months

2027 Public Holidays That Affect Travel

HolidayDate 2027Impact
New Year's Day1 Jan 2027Peak summer — book months ahead
Waitangi Day6 Feb 2027 (Sun) — observed Mon 8 FebLong weekend — Bay of Islands busy
Good Friday26 Mar 2027Many attractions closed; free activities day
Easter Monday29 Mar 2027Long weekend — book accommodation early
ANZAC Day25 Apr 2027 (observed Mon 26 Apr)Dawn services — quiet morning, busy afternoon
King's Birthday7 Jun 2027 (first Mon in June)Ski season opening weekend — Queenstown busy
Matariki25 Jun 2027Mid-winter long weekend — last break before July holidays
Labour Day25 Oct 2027 (last Mon in October)Long weekend — spring travel; book ahead
Christmas Day25 Dec 2027Peak summer — book 4–6 months ahead

2027 Travel Planning Tips

  • Summer campervans: Book your December 2027–January 2028 campervan by June 2027 — peak season vans sell out fast.
  • Ski holidays: July 2027 school holiday ski accommodation in Queenstown and Wanaka — book by May 2027.
  • Easter 2027 is late March (Good Friday 26 Mar – Easter Monday 29 Mar) — it falls in term time, two weeks before the April school holidays, so it's a separate long weekend rather than part of the break. South Island autumn colours peak during the April holidays.
  • Best value: May 2027 and August 2027 — lowest prices, smallest crowds, all attractions open.
meta_desc: Every 2027 NZ school holiday — April, July and September breaks plus summer — with official term dates, crowd levels and how far ahead to book each one.

faq.question: When are the April 2027 school holidays in NZ?
faq.answer: The autumn school holidays run from Saturday 10 April to Monday 26 April 2027. Term 1 ends Friday 9 April and Term 2 starts Tuesday 27 April. ANZAC Day (observed Monday 26 April) falls on the final day of the break.

faq.question: When are the July 2027 school holidays?
faq.answer: The winter school holidays run from Saturday 3 July to Sunday 18 July 2027. Term 2 ends Friday 2 July and Term 3 starts Monday 19 July. This is peak ski season — book Queenstown and Wanaka accommodation by May.

faq.question: When are the September–October 2027 school holidays?
faq.answer: The spring school holidays run from Saturday 25 September to Sunday 10 October 2027. Term 3 ends Friday 24 September and Term 4 starts Monday 11 October.

faq.question: When do the 2027–28 summer holidays start?
faq.answer: Term 4 must end by Friday 17 December 2027, so summer holidays start by Saturday 18 December 2027 and run until schools return in late January or early February 2028 — exact return dates vary by school.

faq.question: Do Easter and the school holidays overlap in 2027?
faq.answer: No. Easter 2027 is late March (Good Friday 26 March, Easter Monday 29 March) and falls during Term 1, two weeks before the April holidays — so families get two separate breaks close together.
